methodology: Multi-dimensional scoring: 8 factors × weighted analysis + competitive landscape + risk matrix

risks.risk: Target market too small for venture-scale returns
risks.mitigation: Perfect for bootstrapped lifestyle business instead
Build compliance-first, hire legal advisor early

risks.risk: Customer acquisition costs exceed lifetime value
risks.mitigation: Start with content/SEO, avoid paid ads initially

suggested_pivots: Build as a Chrome extension instead of standalone app
Verticalize: focus exclusively on real estate professionals
Switch from B2C to B2B — enterprise contracts = faster revenue

comparable_successes.name: Linear
comparable_successes.lesson: Opinionated product design won over generic tools

comparable_successes.name: Vercel
comparable_successes.lesson: Free tier drove massive adoption, monetized enterprise

comparable_successes.name: Gumroad
comparable_successes.lesson: Simplest possible solution for creators — lean and focused
